basicOps.addStepDesc: Click a step type from the left panel; new step appears at canvas center
basicOps.selectNodeDesc: Left-click a node to open the properties panel on the right
basicOps.moveNodeDesc: Drag a node with left mouse button to reposition
basicOps.panDesc: Middle-click or right-click drag to pan
basicOps.zoomDesc: Scroll wheel to zoom, or use +/- buttons at bottom-left
basicOps.fitViewDesc: Click the fit button at bottom-left to center all nodes

connectionOps.connectDesc: Drag from a node's bottom handle to another node's top handle
connectionOps.deleteEdgeDesc: Click an edge to highlight it, then press Backspace or Delete
connectionOps.changeOrderDesc: Delete old edge, then drag from source to new target
connectionOps.startNodeDesc: Green entry marker; drag its edge to any step node to set flow entry

selectionOps.boxSelectDesc: Left-click drag on empty canvas to create selection box
selectionOps.selectAllDesc: Cmd/Ctrl + A to select all nodes
selectionOps.copyDesc: Cmd/Ctrl + C to copy selected nodes
selectionOps.pasteDesc: Cmd/Ctrl + V to paste copied nodes
selectionOps.duplicateDesc: Cmd/Ctrl + D to duplicate the selected step
selectionOps.deleteNodeDesc: Press Backspace or Delete with nodes selected

saveRunOps.manualSaveDesc: Click save button in toolbar or Cmd/Ctrl + S
saveRunOps.autoSaveDesc: Auto-saves 2 seconds after edits; status shown in toolbar
saveRunOps.closeWindowDesc: Unsaved changes are flushed on close
saveRunOps.runScriptDesc: Click Run in toolbar, select profile, then execute
saveRunOps.cancelRunDesc: Click Cancel during execution to abort

propertyOps.editPropsDesc: Click a node to edit its parameters in the right panel
propertyOps.resizePanelDesc: Drag the panel's left edge to adjust width
propertyOps.insertVarDesc: Use the variable button on text fields to insert {{varName}}
propertyOps.selectorTypeDesc: Supports CSS, XPath, and Text element selectors

controlFlowOps.conditionDesc: Condition nodes have then/else outputs connecting to different steps
controlFlowOps.loopDesc: Loop nodes have body (loop body) and next (after loop) outputs
controlFlowOps.dialogDesc: Confirm dialog nodes can define multiple buttons, each with its own branch

properties.newOrSelect: New variable name or select existing

fields.judgePrompt: Judge Prompt (describe the scenario for AI to judge)
fields.booleanHint: AI outputs true or false, usable for condition branching
fields.percentHint: AI outputs 0-100 integer percentage, usable for threshold decisions
fields.title: Title

orphan.warning: {{count}} steps not connected to the flow: {{names}}

save.retryHint: Save failed, will retry on next auto-save
